title: ornithogalum lanatum
intro: Ornithogalum lanatum, commonly known as the 'hanging onion', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Ornithogalum lanatum include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help in reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Ornithogalum lanatum can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
